title: Montebello Park's rose garden gets plaque honouring William Burgoyne's efforts
description: Montebello Park was abuzz as the St. Catharines Horticultural Society and the City unveiled an interpretive panel to honour William Bartlett Burgoyne for his efforts in funding Canada’s first civic rose garden.

title: Leather Shoes and memories
description: By Christina K Sangma The workshop had always smelled of warm leather and rain. It stood at the edge of a quiet town, where time moved gently and days folded into one another like worn fabric. Inside, the walls were lined with tools that had outlived decades, needles, wooden moulds, and threads in earthy colours. [...]

title: The Jemison senior living community under construction in Mountain Brook
description: Construction is underway on The Jemison, a 162-unit senior living community set to open in Mountain Brook in 2027.

title: £1,850 per person warning for Jet2, TUI, Easyjet, BA, Ryanair passengers
description: Action Fraud figures show average losses of around £1,850 per victim in recent years.

title: Avs and Wild mirror each other with star power, elite defensemen and veterans trying to win 1st Cup
description: DENVER (AP) — In many ways, Colorado and Minnesota mirror each other.

title: Maamma Named Watford’s Young Player of the Season
description: Watford’s rising Moroccan star Othmane Maama has been crowned the club’s Young Player of the Season for the 2025/26 campaign. The post Maamma Named Watford’s Young Player of the Season appeared first on Morocco World News .

title: Boosie Badazz Asks for Principal's Reinstatement After Unauthorized School Visit
description: The Baton Rouge rapper said he "feels bad" after a Lafayette high school principal was placed on leave for letting him visit the school without permission from the district.

title: Quote of the Day by Abraham Lincoln: 'When you have got an elephant by the hind leg...'—Inspiring quotes by the 16th president of the United States who played a major role in the abolition of slavery
description: Abraham Lincoln's wisdom on knowing when to let go is highlighted through his quote about an elephant. The article explores his life, from humble beginnings to the presidency, emphasizing his resilience and strategic decision-making during the Civil War. Lincoln's enduring message encourages realistic evaluation and adaptability in both personal and professional life.

title: Breaking down the Big East offseason: Who is chasing UConn, St. John’s?
description: The Big East is shaping up to recover from its down year in men's basketball after a chaotic transfer portal shuffle.
